title: Munch & Crunch Large 19.5cm Stainless Steel Pet Bowl
features: GENEROUS 1.2 LITRE CAPACITY: This dog bowl is perfectly sized for medium dogs, making it great for serving ample portions of dog food or water. Your furry friend will have all they need for a satisfying mealtime or a refreshing drink

DURABLE STAINLESS STEEL: Made from sturdy stainless steel, this bowl is resistant to rust and scratches, ensuring it stays looking great for years. It's a durable option for even the most enthusiastic eaters

LIGHTWEIGHT & PORTABLE: Its lightweight design makes it easy to move around the house or take on the go. Perfect for travel, picnics, or days out, it ensures your dog has a reliable food or water bowl wherever you are
STYLISH PAW PRINT DESIGN: The adorable paw print design gives the bowl a playful touch, making it a charming addition to your dog stuff. Functional and decorative, it suits any home décor
EASY TO CLEAN: The stainless steel surface is simple to wipe down or wash, saving you time and effort. Spend more time enjoying moments with your pet and less time worrying about cleanup
SUITABLE FOR FOOD OR WATER: Whether it’s for kibble, wet dog food, or fresh water, this bowl handles it all. It’s a practical choice for dogs’ daily needs
PERFECT FOR MEDIUM OR LARGE DOGS: Tailored for medium-sized breeds, this bowl ensures your pet gets just the right amount of food or water without spills or overfilling
IDEAL GIFT FOR DOG LOVERS: Looking for gifts for dogs or dog owners? This bowl makes a thoughtful and practical choice for birthdays, Christmas, or just to show your love for a furry friend
GREAT FOR THE HOLIDAY SEASON: Make your pet feel special with this bowl as part of their dog Christmas gifts. It’s a wonderful addition to your festive dog accessories
RELIABLE & LONG LASTING: Invest in a product that offers durability and reliability. This bowl is built to withstand everyday use while maintaining its quality and appearance
description: Product Description The Munch & Crunch stainless steel dog bowl is a must-have for every pet owner who wants practicality and style in their dog's daily routine. Designed with a generous 1.2-litre capacity, it’s perfect for medium-sized dogs, whether it’s meal time or hydration breaks. This durable bowl is crafted from high-quality stainless steel, ensuring long-lasting performance while being easy to clean. The charming paw print design adds a touch of personality, making it more than just a feeding bowl – it’s a delightful addition to your collection of dog accessories. This lightweight and portable dog bowl is equally suited for use at home or on-the-go. Whether it’s for serving your furry friend their favourite dog food or keeping them hydrated with water, this bowl combines functionality with style. It’s an ideal choice for everyday use and also makes a thoughtful gift for dogs, especially during the festive season. Choose the Munch & Crunch dog bowl to make mealtimes and water breaks a joy for your medium-sized companion. Directions Clean regularly Safety Warning Please read all product packaging literature and product labels before use. See more
